case_id: ANC and Penta data elements: fbfJHSPpUQD, hfdmMSPBgLG, fClA2Erf6IO, n6aMJNLdvep

pi_items.source: Task description instructs creating indicator named 'ANC 4th Visit Completion Rate (%)'. The keywords 'anc', 'completion', 'coverage', '4th' would all match this name. Verified via export_result.sh logic which uses ilike matching. The verifier.py checks for these keywords in newly created indicator names.

Task description instructs creating indicator named 'Penta1-Penta3 Dropout Rate (%)'. Keywords 'dropout', 'penta', 'drop' all match. Export_result.sh classifies indicators using these keywords. Verifier.py checks name_lower for these keywords.
Task description instructs creating legend set named 'RMNCAH Performance'. Both keywords match. Export_result.sh uses ilike:RMNCAH filter and checks for 'rmncah' and 'performance' in name_lower.
Task description instructs creating pivot table named 'RMNCAH District Scorecard Q4 2025'. All three keywords match. Export_result.sh checks name_lower for these keywords to classify visualizations.

Task description instructs creating dashboard named 'RMNCAH Scorecard Dashboard 2025'. All three keywords match. Export_result.sh checks name_lower for 'rmncah' and 'scorecard' to classify dashboards.

pi_items.source: Data element UIDs verified via live API: Penta1=fClA2Erf6IO, Penta3=n6aMJNLdvep. The default category option combo UID (HllvX50cXC0) is standard in DHIS2 Sierra Leone demo. The expression editor in DHIS2 2.40 inserts operands as #{dataElementUID.categoryOptionComboUID}.

pi_items.verified_value: Produces valid JSON with all 5 sections (indicator_check, legend_check, visualization_check, dashboard_check, data_element_uids)
pi_items.source: Live execution of export_result.sh produced valid JSON saved at /tmp/rmncah_scorecard_result.json. Output captured in evidence file 12_export_result.json. All sections present with correct structure.

privileged_info_summary: The DHIS2 Sierra Leone demo database (v2.40.11) contains verified data elements: 'ANC 1st visit' (id: fbfJHSPpUQD), 'ANC 4th or more visits' (id: hfdmMSPBgLG, note: NOT 'ANC 4th visit'), 'Penta1 doses given' (id: fClA2Erf6IO, note: no space between Penta and 1), 'Penta3 doses given' (id: n6aMJNLdvep, no space between Penta and 3). All are AGGREGATE domain, NUMBER valueType, SUM aggregation. The indicator type for percentage is named 'Per cent' (id: bWuNrMHEoZ0, factor=100) — NOT 'Percentage'. There are 13 districts at level 2: Bo, Bombali, Bonthe, Kailahun, Kambia, Kenema, Koinadugu, Kono, Moyamba, Port Loko, Pujehun, Tonkolili, Western Area. Analytics tables contain 4.9M rows with Q4 2025 data available for all target data elements (e.g., ANC 1st visit Bo Q4 2025 = 8650). The dropout indicator numerator expression should look like #{fClA2Erf6IO.HllvX50cXC0} - #{n6aMJNLdvep.HllvX50cXC0} (subtraction between two data element operands). The ANC indicator numerator should be #{hfdmMSPBgLG.HllvX50cXC0} and denominator #{fbfJHSPpUQD.HllvX50cXC0}. The task requires creating 5 DHIS2 objects: 2 indicators (with 'Per cent' type), 1 legend set ('RMNCAH Performance' with Red 0-50, Yellow 50-80, Green 80-100), 1 pivot table ('RMNCAH District Scorecard Q4 2025'), and 1 dashboard ('RMNCAH Scorecard Dashboard 2025'). The export_result.sh script correctly detects new objects via ID comparison and checks for subtraction in numerator formula.
